name: ML Campbell coating, color TBD
notes: ML Campbell IS the coating system ACC uses on every paint job. Pick this when the color will be matched-to-sample later or specified in finish notes. ACC prefers ML Campbell branded colors when available; otherwise BM / SW codes are matched in ML Campbell.
